results.rendered_html:
chidura (wie eben) adj. f. ā  P. 3,2,162 .  VOP. 26,152 .
1〉 was leicht reisst: rajju  P. , Sch. hāra  RAGH. 16,62 . = chedanadravya was da abreisst, zerreisst, spaltet u. s. w.  H. an. 3,556 .  MED. r. 157 .
— 2〉 feindlich (vairin)  H. an.   MED. 
— 3〉 betrügerisch, schelmisch (dhūrta)  TRIK. 3,1,6 .  H. an.   MED. 
— Vgl. chittvara.

results.rendered_html:
chidura a. [chid-kurac]
1 Cutting, dividing, removing;  Śi. 6. 8. 
2 Easily breaking.
3 Broken, disordered, deranged; saṃlakṣyate nacchiduro'pi hāraḥ  R. 16. 62. 
4 Hostile.
5 Roguish, knavish.
